titleStmt.title: SII 29.135: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 135. (A.R. No. B. 638 of 1961-62.) CHANDKŪR, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the Durgaparamēśvari temple.

It states that when mahāpradhāna Kēsappa-Oḍeya was governing the Mangaḷūru-rājya during the reign of Devarāya-Voḍeya, Bīraṁṇa of Anegallu made a land grant yielding 600 muḍe paddy for feeding 12 brāhmaṇas daily in the choultry attached to the Durgāparamēśvari temple at Chandakūru. The record gives details of boundaries and income from each piece of land. Sēnabōva Dēvarasa wrote this record.

It is dated Śaka 1339, Dundubhi, Pushya ba. amāvāse, Sunday, Śrāvaṇa nakshtra, Brihaspati in Kuṁbha. The cyclic year Dundubhi is a mistake for Durmukhi. The given details of tithi correspond to 1417 A.D., January 18 when Dēvarāya I was ruling over the empire of Vijayanagara. The tithi amāvāse occured on both 17th and 18th [Sunday and Monday] of the month January. But the nakshatra Śrāvaṇa was on Monday the 18th.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī durgāyai namaḥ namastu
ṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhave . śubhamastu . śakavaruṣa sāvirada mūnūṟa mūvattavoṁbha
ttaneya kuṁbha brihaspatiya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa Amā
vāsiyū Ādityavāra śravaṇa nakṣatra vyatipāta Ardhōdaya kāladalū
śrī madrājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīra dēvarāyavoḍeyaru sa
kala rājyavanū pratipālisuva kāladali śrī maṁmahāpradhāna kesappa O
ḍeyaru maṁgalūra rājyavanu sthira rājyaṁgeyiUttidda kāladalu
śrīmata naḍasina māḍu bīraṁṇara maga mayidāḷuvarāda Ānega
lla bīraṁṇaru caṁdanūra durgāparamēśvariya sthānadalū māḍida dharma
brāhmaṁṇa bhōjanake pratidivasa voṁdakkaṁ Uṁḍu hoṟavaḍu
vajana Aḍigeyātanoba sahita ja 12 yi haṁneraḍu ma
ṁdi brāhmarige bhōjanakke naḍava braṁhasva bhūmi Uḷuvayi mūnūrā
vāsudēvana bāḷige . Ā Uḷuvayya bhūmige gaḍi mūḍalu tāhina beṭṭa
dagaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu . teṁkalu nelliṁjada mattitimara gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu . paḍuvalu bareyada heggaḍeya magaḷiya gaḍiyagaḍi
yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu . baḍagalu yeṟagida beṭṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁti catusīmeyiṁdoḷage yeṇalu suggiya bittuva yeraḍu
beḷeya bhūmi prati mū 1 kkaṁ hāṁ 30 lekkadalu mūla Ā gaddeya ga
ddeyiṁ caṁdakūra chatrada maṭhake naḍava bhatta pramū 1 kkaṁ hā 30
lekkadalu 450 mūḍe bhatta mattaṁ Uḷuvayoḷage jitamūṟara kayyalu
bīraṁṇaru koṁḍa gadde mū 12 yi gaddeyiṁda maṭhakke naḍava bhattada
mū 50 Ubhayaṁ Uḷumeya bayalu mū 100 kkaṁ chatrakke naḍa
va bhatta mū 500 mattaṁ puruśōttama yirāyanamaga subraṁhma
ṇyana bāḷikeya hosamaṭada bayaliṁge gaḍi mūḍalu
gaḍi teṁkalu beṭagaḍi . paḍuvalu Āyilada keṟeyagaḍigadde (ba)
ḍagalu koḷaceya gōviṁdana gaddegaḍi . yiṁti catusimeyiṁ
doḷage bayalu mū 10 majalu mū 10 Ubhayaṁ 20 mūḍegadde
gaddeyiṁdaṁ caṁdakūra catrada maṭhake kālaṁ pratiyalā caṁdrārkka
vāgi naḍasuva bhatta prati mū 1 kkaṁ hā ṁ lekkadalū mū 50 Akṣa
radalū Ayivattu mūḍe batta . mattaṁ yi Ayila hiriya gaddeya keḷa
gaṇa hosa māṭada gaddege gaḍi mūḍalu hoḷegaḍi . teṁkalu mūḍappa
viya vrittigaḍi . paḍuvalu beṭṭa gaḍi baḍugalu hiriya gaddegaḍi . yiṁti
nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage yeraḍa beḷe bittuva bayalu mū 10 yi ha
ttu mūḍe gaddeyiṁdalu chatra maṭhake naḍeva bhatta pramū 1 kkaṁ hā 30 le
kadalū mū 5 Akṣaradalū Ayivattu mūḍe bhatta . Aṁtu 600 mūḍe
bhatta Akṣaradalu Āṟunūṟu mūḍe bhatta caṁdakūra durggāparamēśvariya sa
ṁnidhiyalu brāhmaṇa bhōjanakke Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyiyyāgi naḍeva dharma yidharmma
vanu baṁgarū naḍasina jananeva bāḷuva bīraṁṇarū nālkūra sāvirada nūṟava
rū grāmau pālisi baharu yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu Āditya caṁ
dra Anilāna lōcaḷa Urbhūmirāpōhrudayaṁ yavaśca Ahaśca
rātriśca Ubhayeca saṁdhyē dharṁmmaṁna jānāti narasyavittaṁ . dānapā
lana yōmmadhye dānāśrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . sudattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyōharēta vasuṁdhara ṣaṣṭivaruṣa saha
srāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyate krimi . yidharmmavanū Aḷupi Āvanobanu keḍi
sidātaṁge vāraṇāsiyalu nāvirada nūṟu kavileya koṁda dōṣa ku
rukṣētradalū taṁma tāyitaṁdeyanū vadhisida dōṣa . gōkaranada śrīma
hābala dēvara liṁgava kittadōṣa . śrī durgāparamēśvariya mūrttiyanū ki
tta dōṣa . yidharmavanū yi sthānada jananigaḷu pālisi baharu . yiṁtivaru
bhayāṁmatadiṁ bīraṁṇara sthaḷada sēnabhōvaru dēvarasara baraha . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 29.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
